title: Operational Hub pricing is $750/mo Starter and $1,250/mo + $250/contributor Standard.
content:
The Operational Hub has two pricing tiers:

**Starter ($750/month)**
- Designed for early-stage teams
- Includes entity formation, financial operations
- Up to 5 invoices per month

**Standard ($1,250/month + $250/contributor)**
- For growing teams of 3+ contributors
- Adds contributor onboarding, multi-currency payouts
- Dedicated ops support, expense policies
- Unlimited invoicing

**Advanced & Custom** tier exists for scaling organizations: multiple entity support, dedicated account manager, admin portal, custom workflows. Add-ons available for exchange setup, banking, AML monitoring.

This is significant because it represents Powerhouse's first concrete, recurring revenue model with clear unit economics. A team of 10 contributors on Standard = $1,250 + $2,500 = $3,750/month per customer. Scaling to 20 customers = $75,000 MRR.
description: Two tiers: Starter for early-stage teams (5 invoices/mo), Standard for growing teams (unlimited invoicing, payouts, dedicated support).
